name: codeburn-desktop
description: CodeBurn Desktop — Electron app fed by the codeburn CLI

scripts.build: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "vite" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.package: npm run stage-cli && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:arm64: npm run stage-cli && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.package:x64: npm run stage-cli && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.package:win: npm run stage-cli && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:linux: npm run stage-cli && npm run build && electron-builder --linux

extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: CodeBurn reads your local AI coding tool session logs (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and others) to calculate your token usage and cost. Your data never leaves your machine.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: CodeBurn reads your local AI coding tool session logs (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and others) to calculate your token usage and cost. Your data never leaves your machine.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: CodeBurn reads your local AI coding tool session logs (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and others) to calculate your token usage and cost. Your data never leaves your machine.

author: AgentSeal <hello@agentseal.org>
